paper_title: Geochemical and Sediment Analysis in the Kyushu Region

methods.description: This method describes the collection and initial processing of stream and marine sediment samples for geochemical analysis.

steps.description: Stream sediment samples were collected from locations on Kyushu Island and isolated small islands.
steps.searchable_summary: collect stream sediment samples from specified locations

steps.description: The collected stream sediments were dried in air and sieved through a 180 μm screen.
steps.searchable_summary: dry and sieve stream sediment samples

steps.description: Magnetic minerals contained in samples were removed using a magnet.
steps.searchable_summary: remove magnetic minerals from sediment samples

steps.description: Marine sediment samples were collected using a Kinoshita-type grab sampler.
steps.searchable_summary: collect marine sediment samples using grab sampler

steps.description: The uppermost 3 cm layer of each marine sediment sample was separated, air-dried, ground with an agate mortar and pestle.
steps.searchable_summary: process marine sediment samples by drying and grinding

methods.description: This method involves the digestion and analysis of sediment samples to determine elemental concentrations using ICP-AES and ICP-MS.

steps.description: Each sample was digested using HF, HNO3, and HClO4.
Elemental concentrations were determined using ICP-AES and ICP-MS.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze elemental concentrations using ICP-AES and ICP-MS

steps.description: As and Hg analyses of stream sediment samples were subcontracted to ALS Chemex.
steps.searchable_summary: subcontract As and Hg analysis to external lab

methods.method_name: Cluster Analysis for Source Material Identification
methods.description: This method uses cluster analysis to identify probable source materials for marine sediments based on their chemical compositions.

steps.description: Standardize or transform compositional data of marine and stream sediments.
steps.searchable_summary: standardize compositional data for cluster analysis

steps.description: Perform cluster analysis using the Ward method on transformed data.
steps.searchable_summary: perform cluster analysis using Ward method

methods.description: This method uses elemental concentration ratios to discriminate between stream and marine sediments.

steps.description: Calculate concentration ratios of immobile elements such as Cr/Ti and La/Yb.
Plot scatter diagrams of Cr/Ti and La/Yb ratios.
steps.searchable_summary: create scatter plots for elemental ratios
